parameters.name: Parameter Save
parameters.comment: This parameter is used to save device parameters and recall saved parameters.

parameters.name: Language
parameters.comment: This parameter sets the language of the device. English language is available as standard. When user-defined is selected the 1st language loaded via USB becomes active.

parameters.name: Parameter Return Factory
parameters.comment: Default value assignments embedded in the device are made.

parameters.name: Log Clear
parameters.comment: All fault records in the device are deleted with this parameter.

parameters.name: Engine Hour Setting
parameters.comment: Engine running and load running times in the device can be set as desired as a result of the value entered in this parameter. After saving the parameter the parameter value will be reset and the operating hour value will be updated.

parameters.name: Menu Timeout
parameters.comment: When no key is pressed during the time period specified with this parameter the device will automatically exit the menu. In addition after logging in to the menu if you do not log out with the Menu Logout parameter you can log in to the menu without a password within the time period specified here.

parameters.name: Menu Logout
parameters.comment: Allows manual exit from the menu. Thus password entry is required for the next menu entry.

parameters.name: Mains Off Mode Selection
parameters.comment: When the amplifier module is defined in the device it is the selection of whether the network will be active in off mode.

parameters.name: Mains Overvoltage Alarm Level
parameters.comment: It is the threshold value at which mains overvoltage alarm will be given. This parameter takes value in relation to the 203: Nominal Voltage parameter depending on the 111: Connection Type Parameter.

parameters.name: Mains Undervoltage Alarm Level
parameters.comment: It is the threshold value at which mains undervoltage alarm will be given. This parameter takes value in relation to the 203: Nominal Voltage parameter depending on the 111: Connection Type Parameter.

parameters.name: Mains Overfrequency Alarm Level
parameters.comment: It is the threshold value at which mains overfrequency alarm will be given. This parameter takes value in relation to the 209: Nominal Frequency parameter.

parameters.name: Mains Underfrequency Alarm Level
parameters.comment: It is the threshold value at which mains underfrequency alarm will be given. This parameter takes value in relation to the 209: Nominal Frequency parameter.

parameters.name: Mains Phase Sequence Control Action
parameters.comment: Phase sequence warning action selection is made.

parameters.name: Mains Connection Type
parameters.comment: This parameter selects the connection type of the mains.

parameters.name: Alternator Poles
parameters.comment: Number of alternator poles parameter.

parameters.name: Nominal Voltage
parameters.comment: The nominal phase-notr voltage value at which the generator will operate.

parameters.name: Generator Overvoltage Alarm Action
parameters.comment: Generator overvoltage alarm action.

parameters.name: Generator Overvoltage Alarm Level
parameters.comment: The value associated with 203: Nominal Voltage parameter is the threshold at which a genset overvoltage alarm will be issued. All phases are evaluated one by one and the maximum value is used. When the output voltage exceeds the entered value an overvoltage alarm condition occurs and the action program starts to operate.

parameters.name: Generator Undervoltage Alarm Action
parameters.comment: Generator undervoltage alarm action.

parameters.name: Generator Undervoltage Alarm Level
parameters.comment: The value associated with 203: Nominal Voltage parameter is the threshold at which a genset undervoltage alarm will be issued. All phases are evaluated one by one and the minimum value is used. When the output voltage goes below the entered value an under voltage alarm condition occurs and the action program starts to operate.

parameters.name: Nominal Frequency
parameters.comment: The nominal frequency value at which the generator will operate.

parameters.name: Generator Overfrequency Alarm Action
parameters.comment: Generator overfrequency alarm action.

parameters.name: Generator Overfrequency Alarm Level
parameters.comment: It is the generator overfrequency alarm threshold value which takes value in relation to the 209: Nominal Frequency parameter.

parameters.name: Generator Underfrequency Alarm Action
parameters.comment: Generator underfrequency alarm action.

parameters.name: Generator Underfrequency Alarm Level
parameters.comment: It is the generator underfrequency alarm threshold value which takes value in relation to the Nominal Frequency parameter.

parameters.name: Generator Phase Sequence Control Action
parameters.comment: Phase sequence alarm action selection is made.

parameters.name: Generator Overcurrent Alarm Action
parameters.comment: Generator overcurrent alarm action.

parameters.name: Generator Overcurrent Alarm Level
parameters.comment: This is the threshold at which a generator overcurrent alarm will be issued.

parameters.name: Generator Overpower Alarm Action
parameters.comment: Generator overpower alarm action.

parameters.name: Generator Overpower Alarm Level
parameters.comment: This is the threshold at which a generator overpower alarm will be issued.

parameters.name: Generator current transformer ratio
parameters.comment: It is the generator current transformer ratio. The ratio of the primary current of the current transformer to its secondary current must be entered in this parameter.

parameters.name: Synchronous Transition Selection
parameters.comment: Synchronous transition selection parameter.

parameters.name: Synchronous Transition Frequency Difference
parameters.comment: It is the frequency difference set to the generator for synchronous transition. This parameter can be used with engine with ECU.

parameters.name: Synchronous Transition Maximum Frequency Difference
parameters.comment: Maximum frequency difference allowed for synchronous transition. If the difference between mains and genset frequencies is greater than the value entered in this parameter, synchronous transition is not allowed.

parameters.name: Synchronous Transition Maximum Voltage Difference
parameters.comment: Maximum voltage difference allowed for synchronous transition. If the difference between mains and genset voltages is greater than the value entered in this parameter, synchronous transition is not allowed.

parameters.name: Synchronous Transition Alarm Action
parameters.comment: Action selection is made for synchronous transition alarm.

parameters.name: Generator Connection Type
parameters.comment: Generator connection type selection.

parameters.name: Engine Type
parameters.comment: Generator engine type selection.

parameters.name: Module Function
parameters.comment: Used for AMF-L and MSU-L selections.

parameters.name: Mode Function
parameters.comment: Device mode selection.

parameters.name: Prestart Action
parameters.comment: When a prestart function is defined the time at which this function should take action is selected.

parameters.name: Starter Cut Level From Generator Frequency
parameters.comment: The starter is stopped when the genset frequency exceeds the set value.

parameters.name: Starter Cut Level From Engine Speed
parameters.comment: The starter is stopped when the generator speed exceeds the set value.

parameters.name: Starter Cut Level From Generator Voltage
parameters.comment: The starter is stopped when the generator voltage rises above the set value. If the value is set to 60 the function will become inactive.

parameters.name: Starter Cut Level From Charge Alternator Voltage
parameters.comment: When the charging alternator voltage rises above the set value starting is stopped. If the value is set to 6 the function will become inactive.

parameters.name: Starter Cut Level From Oil Pressure
parameters.comment: The starter is stopped when the oil pressure rises above the set value. If the value is set to 1 the function will become inactive.

parameters.name: Maximum Number of Cranking Attempts
parameters.comment: Maximum number of starting attempts.

parameters.name: Intermittent Horn Output
parameters.comment: The horn function is the choice of continuous or intermittent operation.

parameters.name: Oil Pressure Unit
parameters.comment: Oil pressure unit selection.

parameters.name: Low Oil Pressure Alarm Action
parameters.comment: This parameter is alarm action for low oil pressure.

parameters.name: Low Oil Pressure Alarm Level
parameters.comment: Alarm threshold value for the oil pressure analog input.

parameters.name: Oil Pressure Sender Open Circuit Action
parameters.comment: This parameter is alarm action for oil pressure sender open circuit condition.

parameters.name: Temperature Unit
parameters.comment: Temperature unit selection.

parameters.name: High Coolant Temperature Alarm Action
parameters.comment: This parameter is alarm action for high coolant temperature.

parameters.name: High Coolant Temperature Alarm Level
parameters.comment: Alarm threshold value for the coolant temperature analog input.

parameters.name: Coolant Temperature Sender Open Circuit Action
parameters.comment: This parameter is alarm action for coolant temperature sender open circuit condition.

parameters.name: Low Fuel Level Alarm Action
parameters.comment: This parameter is alarm action for low fuel level.

parameters.name: Low Fuel Level Alarm Level
parameters.comment: Alarm threshold value for the fuel level analog input.

parameters.name: Fuel Level Sender Open Circuit Action
parameters.comment: This parameter is alarm action for fuel level sender open circuit condition.

parameters.name: Fuel Pump Low Limit
parameters.comment: When the fuel level measured by the fuel sender falls below this limit the fuel pump starts.

parameters.name: Fuel Pump High Limit
parameters.comment: The fuel pump stops when the fuel level measured at the fuel sender exceeds this limit.

parameters.name: Coolant Fan Low Limit
parameters.comment: Cooling fan stop temperature limit

parameters.name: Coolant Fan High Limiit
parameters.comment: Cooling fan operating temperature limit

parameters.name: Nominal Battery Voltage
parameters.comment: Nominal battery voltage

parameters.name: Battery Overvoltage Alarm Action
parameters.comment: This parameter is alarm action for battery overvoltage.

parameters.name: Battery Overvoltage Alarm Level
parameters.comment: The threshold value at which a battery overvoltage alarm will be given. It takes value as a percentage of the 328: Nominal Battery voltage parameter.

parameters.name: Battery Undervoltage Alarm Action
parameters.comment: This parameter is alarm action for battery undervoltage.

parameters.name: Battery Undervoltage Alarm Level
parameters.comment: The threshold value at which a battery undervoltage alarm will be given. It takes value as a percentage of the 328: Nominal Battery voltage parameter.

parameters.name: Charge Alternator Overvoltage Alarm Action
parameters.comment: This parameter is alarm action for charge alternator overvoltage.

parameters.name: Charge Alternator Overvoltage Alarm Level
parameters.comment: The threshold value at which a charge alternator overvoltage alarm will be given. It takes value as a percentage of the 328: Nominal Battery voltage parameter.

parameters.name: Charge Alternator Undervoltage Alarm Action
parameters.comment: This parameter is alarm action for charge alternator undervoltage.

parameters.name: Charge Alternator Undervoltage Alarm Level
parameters.comment: The threshold value at which a charge alternator undervoltage alarm will be given. It takes value as a percentage of the 328: Nominal Battery voltage parameter.

parameters.name: Engine Over Speed Alarm Action
parameters.comment: This parameter is alarm action for engine overspeed.

parameters.name: Engine Over Speed Alarm Level
parameters.comment: The threshold value at which engine overspeed alarm will be given.

parameters.name: Engine Under Speed Alarm Action
parameters.comment: This parameter is alarm action for engine underspeed.

parameters.name: Engine Under Speed Alarm Level
parameters.comment: The threshold value at which engine underspeed alarm will be given.

parameters.name: Maintenance Alarm(Oil) Action
parameters.comment: General Maintenance alarm action.

parameters.name: Maintenance Alarm(Air) Action
parameters.comment: Oil Filter Maintenance alarm action.

parameters.name: Maintenance Alarm(Fuel) Action
parameters.comment: Air Filter Maintenance alarm action.

parameters.name: Maintenance Alarm(Common) Action
parameters.comment: Fuel Maintenance alarm action.

parameters.name: Flywheel Teeth
parameters.comment: Number of flywheel teeth. When this parameter is set to a value other than 0, the rpm is calculated from the measurement at the Magnetic Pick-up input, when set to 0 it is calculated from the generator frequency.

parameters.name: Test Mode Load Selection
parameters.comment: When the panel is in test mode, generator loaded or idle test selection is made with this parameter.

parameters.name: Oil Heater Low Temperature Limit
parameters.comment: The temperature at which the oil heater will be activated. If the oil heater function is defined to any of the outputs and the temperature sensor is defined to the Analog-4 input, the operation is performed according to the temperature value read from this input.

parameters.name: Oil Heater High Temperature Limit
parameters.comment: The temperature at which the oil heater will be deactivated. If the oil heater function is defined on any of the outputs and the temperature sensor is defined on the Analog-4 input, the operation is performed according to the temperature value read from this input.

parameters.name: High Aux Temperature Alarm Action
parameters.comment: This parameter is alarm action for high aux temperature.

parameters.name: High Aux Temperature Alarm Level
parameters.comment: It is the threshold value at which a high aux temperature alarm will be given. When a temperature sensor is defined to Analog-4 input, the operation is performed according to the temperature value read from this input.

parameters.name: Aux Temperature Sender Open Circuit Action
parameters.comment: This parameter is alarm action for aux temperature sender open circuit condition.

parameters.name: Mains Fail Delay
parameters.comment: It is the delay time for any mains alarm to occur.

parameters.name: Mains Circuit Break Close Ouput Pulse Time
parameters.comment: Close output pulse duration for the mains circuit breaker.

parameters.name: Mains Circuit Break Open Ouput Pulse Time
parameters.comment: Open output pulse duration for the mains circuit breaker.

parameters.name: Mains Phase Sequence Failure Delay
parameters.comment: Delay time for mains phase sequence alarm.

parameters.name: Generator Overvoltage Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: This is the delay time for the genset overvoltage alarm.

parameters.name: Generator Undervoltage Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: This is the delay time for the genset undervoltage alarm.

parameters.name: Generator Overfrequency Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: This is the delay time for the genset overfrequency alarm.

parameters.name: Generator Underfrequency Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: This is the delay time for the genset underfrequency alarm.

parameters.name: Generator Phase Sequence Failure Delay
parameters.comment: Delay time for generator phase sequence alarm.

parameters.name: Generator Overcurrent Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: This is the delay time for the genset overcurrent alarm.

parameters.name: Generator Overpower Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: This is the delay time for the genset overpower alarm.

parameters.name: Synchronous Transition Maximum Waiting Time
parameters.comment: It is the allowed maximum waiting time for synchronous transition.

parameters.name: Synchronous Transition Time
parameters.comment: It is the time during which resources will work together in synchronous transition.

parameters.name: Synchronous Transition Contactor Delay
parameters.comment: The contactor of the source to be synchronously switched is notified to open before the time entered in this parameter.

parameters.name: Synchronous Transition Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: This is the delay time for the synchronous transition error.

parameters.name: Start Delay
parameters.comment: Parameter for how long it takes to auto-start after the device encounters a mains error.

parameters.name: Mains Return Delay
parameters.comment: This parameter is the mains stabilization time. The timer starts counting when the grid comes back. If there is no problem in the grid during this time, AMF operation mode is terminated.

parameters.name: Prestart Time
parameters.comment: It is the time that the prestart output remains energized before the engine starts.

parameters.name: Maximum Cranking Time
parameters.comment: It is the maximum time during which the starter will be energized during cranking.

parameters.name: Cranking Wait Time
parameters.comment: Waiting time between two starting attempts.

parameters.name: Safety On Delay
parameters.comment: This is the time during startup during which the panel ignores oil pressure, engine speed and other delayed alarms. This parameter is used to ensure that the engine reaches its rated speed before the protections are activated. When this parameter is set to 0, this function will be disabled.

parameters.name: Choke Timer
parameters.comment: This time controls the release delay of the choke output. The choke output becomes active with the cranking. It releases when the engine starts or when this time expires (whichever comes first).

parameters.name: Starter Cut Level Oil Pressure Delay
parameters.comment: If the oil pressure level rises during starting, the engine should not start immediately. The key value will be checked with a delay. If the value is set to 0, the function is disabled.

parameters.name: Stop Selenoid Timer
parameters.comment: It is the time elapsed during the generator stop state.

parameters.name: Warm Up Time
parameters.comment: It is the time the engine runs at idle before it is allowed to pick up the load. This parameter is used to prevent excessive wear by warming the engine. When this parameter is set to 0, this function will be disabled.

parameters.name: Cooling Time
parameters.comment: It is the cooling time without load before stopping the generator.

parameters.name: Transfer Time
parameters.comment: It is the time between the opening of one load switch and the closing of the other. It is used during load transfer to and from the generator. This parameter 228: It is used when the synchronous transition parameter is 0.

parameters.name: Horn Time
parameters.comment: When an alarm occurs, how long the horn output will be active is determined by this parameter. If this time is set to 900, the horn output will be active indefinitely when an alarm occurs.

parameters.name: Low Oil Pressure Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: It is the alarm delay time for the oil pressure analog input.

parameters.name: Oil Pressure Sender Open Circuit Delay
parameters.comment: This is the delay time for oil pressure sensor open circuit detection.

parameters.name: High Coolant Temperature Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: It is the alarm delay time for the coolant temperature analog input.

parameters.name: Coolant Temperature Sender Open Circuit Delay
parameters.comment: Delay time for coolant temperature sensor open circuit detection.

parameters.name: Low Fuel Level Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: It is the alarm delay time for fuel level analog input.

parameters.name: Fuel Level Sender Open Circuit Delay
parameters.comment: It is the delay time for fuel level sensor open circuit detection.

parameters.name: Engine Over Speed Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: It is the delay time for engine overspeed alarm.

parameters.name: Engine Under Speed Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: It is the delay time for engine underspeed alarm.

parameters.name: Maintenance Alarm(Oil) Time
parameters.comment: While the engine is running, the maintenance timer starts counting. When the entered time value is reached, a maintenance time warning alarm is given.

parameters.name: Maintenance Alarm(Air) Time
parameters.comment: While the engine is running, the maintenance timer starts counting. When the entered time value is reached, a maintenance time warning alarm is given.

parameters.name: Maintenance Alarm(Fuel) Time
parameters.comment: While the engine is running, the maintenance timer starts counting. When the entered time value is reached, a maintenance time warning alarm is given.

parameters.name: Maintenance Alarm(Common) Time
parameters.comment: While the engine is running, the maintenance timer starts counting. When the entered time value is reached, a maintenance time warning alarm is given.

parameters.name: Service Time Reset
parameters.comment: It is the selection of assignment of service times to the entered time parameters.

parameters.name: High Aux Temperature Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: It is the alarm delay time for the aux temperature analog input.

parameters.name: Aux Temperature Sender Open Circuit Delay
parameters.comment: This is the delay time for aux temperature sensor open circuit detection.

parameters.name: J1939 ECU Type
parameters.comment: This is the parameter where the ECU type is selected.

parameters.name: ECU Speed Control Enable
parameters.comment: This is the parameter where you can choose to read the speed information via the device or the ECU.

parameters.name: ECU Oil Pressure Control Enable
parameters.comment: This is the parameter where you can choose to read the oil pressure information via the device or the ECU.

parameters.name: ECU Temperature Control Enable
parameters.comment: This is the parameter where you can choose to read the coolant temperature information via the device or the ECU.

parameters.name: Engine Speed SetPoint
parameters.comment: Engine speed set point selection.

parameters.name: Engine Speed Correction
parameters.comment: Engine speed correction ratio selection.

parameters.name: CAN ECU Communication Fail Action
parameters.comment: It is the alarm action of CanBUS communication error for ECU.

parameters.name: CAN ECU Droop Enable
parameters.comment: It is the parameter of ECU droop selection.

parameters.name: Can Ecu Droop Percent
parameters.comment: If ECU droop selection is active, this parameter is ECU droop percentage selection.

parameters.name: Can Source Address
parameters.comment: This is the parameter where AMF-L's can source address information is entered.

parameters.name: Can UKB Selection
parameters.comment: This parameter is used to select the panel's remote control operating modes.If you are using a second device for monitoring purposes, assign the device that will communicate with the one on the generator via remote CAN bus as the “Monitoring” device. Make sure the firmware versions of the devices are the same.

parameters.name: CAN Communication Fail Action
parameters.comment: It is the alarm action of CanBUS communication error.

parameters.name: Ethernet DHCP Selection
parameters.comment: It is used to activate the Ethernet DHCP feature and enable the panel to automatically obtain IP from the server.

parameters.name: IP Address 0
parameters.comment: It is the value in position A for the IP address kept in the A.B.C.D order.

parameters.name: IP Address 1
parameters.comment: It is the value in position B for the IP address kept in the A.B.C.D order.

parameters.name: IP Address 2
parameters.comment: It is the value in position C for the IP address kept in the A.B.C.D order.

parameters.name: IP Address 3
parameters.comment: It is the value in position D for the IP address kept in the A.B.C.D order.

parameters.name: Netmask Address 0
parameters.comment: It is the value in position A for the Netmask address kept in the A.B.C.D order.

parameters.name: Netmask Address 1
parameters.comment: It is the value in position B for the Netmask address kept in the A.B.C.D order.

parameters.name: Netmask Address 2
parameters.comment: It is the value in position C for the Netmask address kept in the A.B.C.D order.

parameters.name: Netmask Address 3
parameters.comment: It is the value in position D for the Netmask address kept in the A.B.C.D order.

parameters.name: Gateway Address 0
parameters.comment: It is the value in position A for the Gateway address kept in the A.B.C.D order.

parameters.name: Gateway Address 1
parameters.comment: It is the value in position B for the Gateway address kept in the A.B.C.D order.

parameters.name: Gateway Address 2
parameters.comment: It is the value in position C for the Gateway address kept in the A.B.C.D order.

parameters.name: Gateway Address 3
parameters.comment: It is the value in position D for the Gateway address kept in the A.B.C.D order.

parameters.name: Tcp Destination IP Address 0
parameters.comment: It is the value in position A for the Tcp Target address, which is kept in the A.B.C.D order.

parameters.name: Tcp Destination IP Address 1
parameters.comment: It is the value in position B for the Tcp Target address, which is kept in the A.B.C.D order.

parameters.name: Tcp Destination IP Address 2
parameters.comment: It is the value in position C for the Tcp Target address, which is kept in the A.B.C.D order.

parameters.name: Tcp Destination IP Address 3
parameters.comment: It is the value in position D for the Tcp Target address, which is kept in the A.B.C.D order.

parameters.name: Tcp Destination ID Number
parameters.comment: It is the ID number of target TCP.

parameters.name: Tcp Source ID Number
parameters.comment: It is the ID number of source TCP.

parameters.name: Relay Output-1 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where Relay Output-1 function selection is made.

parameters.name: Relay Output-1 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where Relay Output-1 function selection is made.

parameters.name: Relay Output-1 Polarity
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where Relay Output-1 polarity selection is made.

parameters.name: Relay Output-2 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where Relay Output-2 function selection is made.

parameters.name: Relay Output-2 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where Relay Output-2 function selection is made.

parameters.name: Relay Output-2 Polarity
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where Relay Output-2 polarity selection is made.

parameters.name: Relay Output-3 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where Relay Output-3 function selection is made.

parameters.name: Relay Output-3 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where Relay Output-3 function selection is made.

parameters.name: Relay Output-3 Polarity
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where Relay Output-3 polarity selection is made.

parameters.name: Relay Output-4 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where Relay Output-4 function selection is made.

parameters.name: Relay Output-4 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where Relay Output-4 function selection is made.

parameters.name: Relay Output-4 Polarity
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where Relay Output-4 polarity selection is made.

parameters.name: Digital Output-1 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where Digital Output-1 function selection is made.

parameters.name: Digital Output-1 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where Digital Output-1 function selection is made.

parameters.name: Digital Output-1 Polarity
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where Digital Output-1 polarity selection is made.

parameters.name: Digital Output-2 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where Digital Output-2 function selection is made.

parameters.name: Digital Output-2 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where Digital Output-2 function selection is made.

parameters.name: Digital Output-2 Polarity
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where Digital Output-2 polarity selection is made.

parameters.name: Digital Output-3 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where Digital Output-3 function selection is made.

parameters.name: Digital Output-3 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where Digital Output-3 function selection is made.

parameters.name: Digital Output-3 Polarity
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where Digital Output-3 polarity selection is made.

parameters.name: Digital Output-4 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where Digital Output-4 function selection is made.

parameters.name: Digital Output-4 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where Digital Output-4 function selection is made.

parameters.name: Digital Output-4 Polarity
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where Digital Output-4 polarity selection is made.

parameters.name: Digital Input-1 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where the function selection of Digital Input-1 is made.

parameters.name: Digital Input-1 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where the function selection of Digital Input-1 is made.

parameters.name: Digital Input-1 Polarity
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where polarity selection of Digital Input-1 is made.

parameters.name: Digital Input-1 Action
parameters.comment: If the Digital Input-1 function is set as user configured, the alarm action function will operate according to the selection.

parameters.name: Digital Input-1 Arming
parameters.comment: If the Digital Input-1 function is set as user configured, the alarm of the input will be active according to the timing selection set in this parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Input-2 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where the function selection of Digital Input-2 is made.

parameters.name: Digital Input-2 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where the function selection of Digital Input-2 is made.

parameters.name: Digital Input-2 Polarity
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where polarity selection of Digital Input-2 is made.

parameters.name: Digital Input-2 Action
parameters.comment: If the Digital Input-2 function is set as user configured, the alarm action function will operate according to the selection.

parameters.name: Digital Input-2 Arming
parameters.comment: If the Digital Input-2 function is set as user configured, the alarm of the input will be active according to the timing selection set in this parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Input-3 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where the function selection of Digital Input-3 is made.

parameters.name: Digital Input-3 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where the function selection of Digital Input-3 is made.

parameters.name: Digital Input-3 Polarity
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where polarity selection of Digital Input-3 is made.

parameters.name: Digital Input-3 Action
parameters.comment: If the Digital Input-3 function is set as user configured, the alarm action function will operate according to the selection.

parameters.name: Digital Input-3 Arming
parameters.comment: If the Digital Input-3 function is set as user configured, the alarm of the input will be active according to the timing selection set in this parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Input-4 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where the function selection of Digital Input-4 is made.

parameters.name: Digital Input-4 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where the function selection of Digital Input-4 is made.

parameters.name: Digital Input-4 Polarity
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where polarity selection of Digital Input-4 is made.

parameters.name: Digital Input-4 Action
parameters.comment: If the Digital Input-4 function is set as user configured, the alarm action function will operate according to the selection.

parameters.name: Digital Input-4 Arming
parameters.comment: If the Digital Input-4 function is set as user configured, the alarm of the input will be active according to the timing selection set in this parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Input-5 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where the function selection of Digital Input-5 is made.

parameters.name: Digital Input-5 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where the function selection of Digital Input-5 is made.

parameters.name: Digital Input-5 Polarity
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where polarity selection of Digital Input-5 is made.

parameters.name: Digital Input-5 Action
parameters.comment: If the Digital Input-5 function is set as user configured, the alarm action function will operate according to the selection.

parameters.name: Digital Input-5 Arming
parameters.comment: If the Digital Input-5 function is set as user configured, the alarm of the input will be active according to the timing selection set in this parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Input-6 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where the function selection of Digital Input-6 is made.

parameters.name: Digital Input-6 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where the function selection of Digital Input-6 is made.

parameters.name: Digital Input-6 Polarity
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where polarity selection of Digital Input-6 is made.

parameters.name: Digital Input-6 Action
parameters.comment: If the Digital Input-6 function is set as user configured, the alarm action function will operate according to the selection.

parameters.name: Digital Input-6 Arming
parameters.comment: If the Digital Input-6 function is set as user configured, the alarm of the input will be active according to the timing selection set in this parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Input-7 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where the function selection of Digital Input-7 is made.

parameters.name: Digital Input-7 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where the function selection of Digital Input-7 is made.

parameters.name: Digital Input-7 Polarity
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where polarity selection of Digital Input-7 is made.

parameters.name: Digital Input-7 Action
parameters.comment: If the Digital Input-7 function is set as user configured, the alarm action function will operate according to the selection.

parameters.name: Digital Input-7 Arming
parameters.comment: If the Digital Input-7 function is set as user configured, the alarm of the input will be active according to the timing selection set in this parameter.

parameters.name: Analogue Input-1 Sensor Type
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where the hardware selection of Analog Input-1 is made.

parameters.name: Analogue Input-1 Sensor Selection
parameters.comment: If Analog Input-1 is selected as a pressure sensor, this is the parameter by which the sensor is selected.

parameters.name: Analogue Input-1 Source
parameters.comment: When Analog Input-1 is set as digital input, the input function is the parameter by which the selection is made.

parameters.name: Communication Handshake Selection
parameters.comment: It is the selection that determines whether the communication is ENKO encrypted or not.

parameters.name: Communication Timeout
parameters.comment: If there is no communication for the time set in this parameter and the ‘Communication Handshake Selection’ parameter is selected active, the device enters the password mode again. In order to communicate, the password must be decrypted again. If the ‘Communication Handshake Selection’ parameter is inactive, this parameter is ignored.

parameters.name: Target Speed Before Load Energization
parameters.comment: When this parameter is set to 1500, the function does not operate. When it is set to a value other than 1500, the 0-10V AVR control output provides a fixed 5V signal. The governor to be used should be configured to deliver the target speed at 5V.

parameters.name: Load Pickup Threshold
parameters.comment: This parameter is used to define the engine speed (RPM) at which the load will be enabled. The value is entered as a percentage of 356: Target Speed Before Load Energization.

parameters.name: Nominal Speed Control Voltage
parameters.comment: This parameter defines the 0–10V AVR output voltage that corresponds to the nominal frequency. It is active only when the governor control mode is enabled.

parameters.name: Targed Speed Control Voltage
parameters.comment: This parameter defines the 0–10V AVR output voltage that corresponds to the target frequency. It is only active when governor control mode is enabled.

parameters.name: Tcp Destination Port Number
parameters.comment: It is the port number of target TCP.

parameters.name: Ethernet Port Number
parameters.comment: It is the port number of Ethernet.

parameters.name: Extension Board Selection
parameters.comment: This parameter is used to select the Extension Board. When this parameter is set to 1, the inputs, outputs, and other related information of the Extension Board are activated.

parameters.name: Extension Board Digital Input-1 Source
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where the function selection of extension board digital input-1 is made.

parameters.name: Extension Board Digital Input-1 Polarity
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where polarity selection of extension board digital input-1 is made.

parameters.name: Extension Board Digital Input-1 Action
parameters.comment: If the extension board digital input-1 function is set as user configured, the alarm action function will operate according to the selection.

parameters.name: Extension Board Digital Input-1 Arming
parameters.comment: If the extension board digital input-1 function is set as user configured, the alarm of the input will be active according to the timing selection set in this parameter.

parameters.comment: It is the parameter where the function selection of extension board digital input-2 is made.

parameters.name: Extension Board Digital Input-2 Polarity
parameters.comment: It is the parameter where polarity selection of extension board digital input-2 is made.

parameters.name: Extension Board Digital Input-2 Action
parameters.comment: If the extension board digital input-2 function is set as user configured, the alarm action function will operate according to the selection.

parameters.name: Extension Board Digital Input-2 Arming
parameters.comment: If the extension board digital input-2 function is set as user configured, the alarm of the input will be active according to the timing selection set in this parameter.

parameters.comment: It is the parameter where the function selection of extension board digital input-3 is made.

parameters.comment: If the extension board digital input-3 function is set as user configured, the alarm action function will operate according to the selection.

parameters.name: PI Minimum Control Voltage
parameters.comment: The PI minimum control voltage used in motor speed control.

parameters.name: PI Maximum Control Voltage
parameters.comment: The PI maximum control voltage used in motor speed control.

parameters.name: PI Hysteresis Voltage Value
parameters.comment: The PI hysteresis voltage value used in motor speed control.

parameters.name: PI Minimum Control Frequency
parameters.comment: The PI minimum control frequency used in motor speed control.

parameters.name: PI Maximum Control Frequency
parameters.comment: The PI maximum control frequency used in motor speed control.

parameters.name: PI Hysteresis Frequency Value
parameters.comment: The PI hysteresis frequency value used in motor speed control.

parameters.name: Auxiliary Capacitor On Frequency
parameters.comment: When the additional capacitor function is used, the capacitor is switched on when the frequency exceeds the set value.

parameters.name: Auxiliary Capacitor Off Frequency
parameters.comment: When the additional capacitor function is used, the capacitor is switched off when the frequency falls below the set value.

parameters.name: Auxiliary Capacitor Minimum Working Time
parameters.comment: When the additional capacitor function is used, the capacitor remains engaged for at least the duration specified by this parameter.

parameters.name: Fuel Pump Maximum Working Time
parameters.comment: When the fuel pump filling output is used, the pump is allowed to operate for a maximum of this duration. If this time expires, a fuel filling error is generated.

parameters.name: Manual Mode Mains Control Selection
parameters.comment: This parameter determines whether the mains stabilization time is counted in manual mode. When set to 1, the mains stabilization time is also waited for in manual mode.

parameters.name: Ethernet Reserved 1
parameters.comment: Reserved

parameters.name: Ethernet Reserved 2
parameters.comment: Reserved

parameters.name: Ethernet Reserved 3
parameters.comment: Reserved

parameters.name: RS485 Baud Rate
parameters.comment: This parameter defines the RS485 baud rate selection.

parameters.name: RS485 Data Bit
parameters.comment: This parameter defines the RS485 data bit selection.

parameters.name: RS485 Stop Bit
parameters.comment: This parameter defines the RS485 stop bit selection.

parameters.name: RS485 Parity Bit
parameters.comment: This parameter defines the RS485 parity bit selection.

parameters.name: RS485 Slave ID
parameters.comment: This parameter defines the RS485 slave ID selection.

parameters.name: RS485 Timeout
parameters.comment: It is the timeout period defined for RS485 communication with the slave device. A value greater than the query time must be entered.

parameters.name: RS485 Control Action
parameters.comment: Parameter for selecting the generator's action (run or stop) in case of RS485 communication failure.

parameters.name: RS485 Selection
parameters.comment: This parameter defines the RS485 communication mode selection.

parameters.name: ECU Diesel Particulate Filter Regeneration State
ECU Diesel Particulate Filter Regeneration Timer
